summary_en: 45,000 shares (1.02% of shares outstanding) up to ¥74.25M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 26, 2026 at closing price of ¥1,650/share.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On May 25, 2026, Okumura Engineering's board authorized the acquisition of up to 45,000 treasury shares (1.02% of outstanding shares) for a maximum aggregate amount of ¥74.25 million. The purchase is to be executed via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on May 26, 2026 at 08:45 AM JST, at the previous day's closing price of ¥1,650 per share. The stated rationale is to enhance capital efficiency and enable flexible capital allocation. Results will be disclosed immediately following the trading session. The order is subject to market conditions and may be partially or fully unfilled.
